name: Week 9 KB — Recovery (Skill-Only, No Hip Hinge)
description: QL recovery week KB day. NO swings (hip hinge = QL reload), NO B-stance flow (unilateral hip bracing), NO heavy C&P (overhead lockout under load stresses spine). Just light skill drilling: bent press, windmill, TGU, cossack. 20lb. Groove, don't grind. 25 min max.

exercises.notes: Spine mobility — pay attention to QL tightness.
20lb (drop from 25). Groove the path slow. Bent press is actually good for hip mobility — just go light.
20lb goblet (drop from 25). Mobility, not strength. Deep, slow. 5/side not 8 — half volume this week.
20lb. Hip hinge is gentle here (supported by the locked arm) — should actually help the hip flexors release. Go slow and feel the stretch.
20lb (drop from 25). Focus on the left side (still weak link). Slow transitions, pause at each checkpoint. Zero rush.
45s each side. Gentle QL release — the exact muscle we're recovering.

tips: RECOVERY KB — skill only. NO swings, NO B-stance flow, NO heavy C&P this week.
Bent press and windmill are actually helpful for hip/QL release at light weight — keep these.
TGU at 20lb is pure pattern drilling.
End with floor mobility — pigeon, child's pose, spinal twist. The QL release is the whole point.
If anything tweaks the back, stop and stretch instead. This is a stretching day if it needs to be.
